name: @rootherald/native
description: Node.js N-API binding to the Root Herald native embeddable SDK (RootHerald.dll on Windows).

scripts.prebuild: echo "prebuildify is opt-in; run npm run prebuildify after RootHerald.dll is built"
scripts.test: echo "see proxy-reference for unit tests; native tests require TPM hardware"

_gypfileNote: gypfile is intentionally false here — the addon is built explicitly via `npm run build:native` after RootHerald.dll is produced by the C++ CMake build. End-user consumers get the prebuilt .node via node-gyp-build.
